creator: wcarson.bugzilla@disillusion.net
text:
Not sure if this helps, but here is the truss output:


# truss -o ~/check_icmp_out /usr/local/libexec/nagios/check_icmp -vvvvvvH 127.0.0.1
address_family: 2 (IPv4 = 2; IPv6 = 10)
